name: cache layer: cache key for (rule,file) includes sha256 of file content (changes invalidate)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" 2>r1.json; sha1=$(shasum -a 256 .cache | awk '{print $1}'); echo "ok=true" > f.js; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" 2>r2.json; sha2=$(shasum -a 256 .cache | awk '{print $1}'); [ "$sha1" != "$sha2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
